ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset for which data is collected */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price for the asset */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price for the asset */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price for the asset */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Closing price for the asset */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the asset */,
  "time_frame" TEXT /* Time frame of the data (e.g., intra-day, daily, weekly) */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the latest revision */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the data */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_last_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset (e.g., Apple Inc.) */,
  "asset_class" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset class */,
  "exchange" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the asset is traded */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the asset */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the asset (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the asset (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_exchange FOREIGN KEY ("exchange") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_class FOREIGN KEY ("asset_class") REFERENCES asset_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent asset class */,
  "standardized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the asset class is standardized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asset_classes_parent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_class_id") REFERENCES asset_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "teams" TEXT /* Teams the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data entry
Reference to the asset for which data is collected
Volume of trades for the asset
Time frame of the data (e.g., intra-day, daily, weekly)
Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry)
User ID of the user who last updated the data

Reference to the stock exchange where the asset is traded
Currency in which the asset is traded

Industry of the asset (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals)

Reference to the parent asset class
Indicates if the asset class is standardized

Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin)
Timestamp when the user account was created
